phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main nave entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿por dónde se entra a la nave principal?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, por DOHN-deh seh en-TRAH ah lah NAH-veh prin-see-PAHL?

likely_response.local: Por la Puerta del Perdón, en la fachada
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah DEHL pehr-DÓN EHN LAH fahth-AH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the side door, facing the square.

responses.english: At the side door, facing the square.
responses.phonetic: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah DEHL pehr-DÓN EHN LAH fahth-AH-dah
responses.french: Por la Puerta del Perdón, en la fachada

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cathedral entrance is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está la entrada principal de la catedral?
phrases.pronunciation: dee-SKOOL-peh DÓN-deh EHSTÁ LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL DEH LAH kah-tehd-RAHL

likely_response.local: En la Plaza de la Catedral, puertas grandes.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH PLAH-thah DEH LAH kah-tehd-RAHL poo-EHR-tahs GRAHN-dehs
likely_response.translation_en: Facing the square, central doors open.

responses.english: Facing the square, central doors open.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH PLAH-thah DEH LAH kah-tehd-RAHL poo-EHR-tahs GRAHN-dehs
responses.french: En la Plaza de la Catedral, puertas grandes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where tower climb tickets are sold
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde venden entradas para la torre?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-des VEN-den en-TRA-das pa-ra la TO-rre?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla de la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah DEH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket booth on the left.

responses.english: At the ticket booth on the left.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah DEH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: En la taquilla de la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up pre-booked audio guides
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo recoger las audioguías reservadas previamente?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh reh-koh-HEHR lahs ow-dee-oh-GEE-ahs reh-ser-BAH-dahs preh-vee-AH-men-teh?

likely_response.local: En el mostrador de entrada, por favor.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH ehnt-RAH-dah POHR fah-BOHR

responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH ehnt-RAH-dah POHR fah-BOHR
responses.french: En el mostrador de entrada, por favor.
